next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/homepage-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add BIND A record homepage-a and apex @ → nginx-waf-a in hdc.example.invalid zone.
Add nginx-waf sites[] hdc-homepage with upstream http://<ct-ip>:3000 and internal_only access.
Browse https://hdc.example.invalid from LAN after nginx-waf maintain issues the LE certificate.
Edit homepage/*.yaml in hdc-private and run maintain to refresh the dashboard.
For Proxmox widgets: add provision.service_accounts[] in proxmox config, widget blocks in services.yaml, then maintain.
